title: BEM-931 final protocol
objective:

Purpose: final protocol with detailed implementation roadmap, prepared on the basis of BEM-930 unified detailed analytics report.
Basis:
- governance/reports/BEM930_UNIFIED_DETAILED_ANALYTICS_REPORT.md
- governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM931_CONTEXT_READ.md
Core corrections preserved:
- Objects GD/DIR/WRK have passports, not prompts.
- Prompts belong only to LLM roles, providers and operational handlers.
- Curator is object-level element.
- Workspace belongs to internal contour.
- Vertical link is Curator -> Curator.
- Internal contour input is Curator -> Analyst.
- Internal contour algorithm is Analyst -> Auditor -> Executor -> Auditor, with revisions through Analyst.
- Final contour output is Auditor -> Curator.
- Horizontal link is Auditor A -> Analyst B or Analyst B requests verified data from Auditor A.
- Provider model is GPT Analyst, Claude Auditor, Claude Executor, fallback GPT-Codex/Codex for Claude roles.
- Telegram is operator front, not system center.
- Release PASS requires non-null CI/Git SHA.
- Claude requirements are release blockers.

- Mandatory basis of protocol.
- Target working state.
- Current gap diagnosis.
- Entities to create.
- Registries and schemas file list.
- Full link matrix.
- Internal contour algorithm.
- Prompt pack and contracts without object prompts.
- Provider model.
- Maximum-detail implementation roadmap.
- Claude requirements mapping.
- Definition of Done and release criteria.
- Final protocol quality checklist.
Roadmap:
- 14 implementation blocks.
- 103 detailed substeps.
- Each substep includes action, artifact/file, check, proof and gate.
